    @allure.story(AllureStory.CREATE_ITEM)

                    strict=True,
                    reason="BUG-16: POST /item –Ņ—Ä–ł–Ĺ–ł–ľ–į–Ķ—ā –ĺ—ā—Ä–ł—Ü–į—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–Ļ sellerID –ł –≤–ĺ–∑–≤—Ä–į—Č–į–Ķ—ā 200 –≤–ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–ĺ 400",
                ),

                ),
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_create_item_invalid_seller_id(
        self,
        items_client: ItemsClient,
        valid_item_payload: dict[str, Any],
        cleanup_items: list[str],
        seller_id: int,
        description: str,
    ) -> None:
        allure.dynamic.title(f"Negative: –°–ĺ–∑–ī–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ –ĺ–Ī—ä—Ź–≤–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź {description}")

        try_cleanup_on_unexpected_success(response, cleanup_items)
